mapper.insert: INSERT INTO case_complaint_file (case_id, original_file_name, oss_object_name, file_size, file_type, remark, uploader_id, uploader_name, upload_time, update_time) VALUES (#{caseId}, #{originalFileName}, #{ossObjectName}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{remark}, #{uploaderId}, #{uploaderName}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM case_complaint_file WHERE case_id = #{caseId} ORDER BY upload_time DESC
